questions.question: What does the variable S represent in the Ebbinghaus forgetting curve formula R(t) = e^(−t/S)?
questions.hint: Think about how long a memory can persist without reinforcement.

questions.question: Which similarity metric does ChromaDB use to compare embedding vectors?
questions.hint: It measures the angle between vectors, not their length.

questions.question: According to the CAP theorem, which three properties can distributed systems only achieve two of simultaneously?
